title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature from Anthropic that enables users to build website prototypes, landing pages, and presentations using AI. The tool generates layouts, UI components, and code from text prompts and supports multiple design modes including prototypes, slide decks, templates, and custom options.
